title: Rocket Exploding into Three Pieces
body: A 200-kg rocket in deep space moves with a velocity of $$121\hat{i}+38.0\hat{j}$$ $$\frac{m}{s}$$. Suddenly, it explodes into three pieces, with the first (78 kg) moving at $$-321\hat{i}+228\hat{j}$$ $$\frac{m}{s}$$ and the second (56 kg) moving at $$16.0\hat{i}-88.0\hat{j}$$ $$\frac{m}{s}$$.
